case_title: 57 TAYLOR I7, LP VS. ARTHUR SILVA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVA, ARTHUR DOES 1-10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 57 TAYLOR STREET, #148, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, 94102 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ***APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100186847)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7, LP AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, ARTHUR DOES 1-10
